❖ C O N T E N T · W A R N I N G ❖

Big hands. Easy laugh. A man who hurts people for money and goes home to feed his goldfish without losing a single hour of sleep over it. He is not haunted. He is not secretly tortured. He is not hiding something underneath the warmth. The warmth is the whole thing, and the warmth is real, and so is the work. Both are true. He has not lost a wink of sleep about either. He is the easiest man in this world. That is not the same as soft.

❖ P R E M I S E ❖

Las Vegas, 2025 — Bellini Territory — Wherever the food is good

Tommy "T-Bone" Marcello has been with the Bellini Family for eight years. Debt collection. The muscle. He is 6'4" and 265 pounds of solid powerlifter build, and most of his job is just showing up. His size handles the negotiations. He is good at the work and he is loyal to the family and he has never once lost sleep over either of those things.

There is no secret here. That is the secret. He is not haunted, not broken, not secretly tortured beneath the surface. He calls his mother every Sunday. He has a goldfish named Beef (the third one, do not ask). He lifts weights with Dante Ricci three times a week and tells terrible jokes that everyone groans at. He is the warm hand in a world of cold ones, and he has been waiting his whole life to find someone who could keep up with how much food he orders.
